title: Bethesda’s union claims laid off employees were told they’d have jobs until September.
summary: Xbox’s ‘reset’: all the news about Microsoft’s layoffs and studio changes The OneBGS union said in a post that Bethesda laid off some of its Canadian employees on July 17th, weeks sooner than employees were warned the layoffs would happen, PC Gamer…
